coachingPoints: Reps > lectures. Talk 15 sec, demo 15 sec, move.
4 stations, 3 players each, rotate every 12 min on coach whistle.
At 9U: praise effort and mechanics, not outcomes.
Pitching station: stop immediately if arm drops sidearm or kid looks fatigued — protect arms.
Simulated game: every kid hits once. Run off 10th pitch regardless of contact — keeps pace.

blocks.title: Running warm-up (4 lines)
drills: Setup: 4 lines at starting cone, cones ~100 ft apart, down-and-back rotations
blocks.notes: 10 total reps, down-and-back. Keep lines tight — next kid goes when prior finishes cone.

blocks.title: 4-station rotation — 12 min each

stations.name: Station 1 — Fielding
drills: Round 1 (4 min): routine grounders from 25 ft — 'wide base, funnel to belly button'
Round 2 (4 min): backhand — step with right foot (RHT), glove thumb down
Round 3 (4 min): charge play — short-hop slow roller, two hands always

stations.name: Station 2 — Soft toss + hitting
drills: Coach soft-tosses from side into net at waist height
Round 1: middle — drive up the middle
Round 2: inside — hands inside ball, pull-side gap
Round 3: outside — stay back, oppo gap
Cue: 'knob to ball, barrel through zone'

stations.name: Station 3 — Out Field Fielding
drills: Hit fly balls and ground balls from outfied
Ask why we need to get balls in quick. All runners must stop once ball is in infeild

stations.name: Station 4 — Throwing accuracy
drills: Targets: a Hula Hoop on dense
Score: 1 pts for each target hit

blocks.notes: Whistle to rotate at 12 min. Coaches stay at station, kids move.

blocks.title: Simulated game — 12-spot rotation
drills: Setup: coaches pitch + catch. 8 in field (4 OF + 3B/SS/2B/1B). 5 in bat queue (B1 at bat, B2 on deck, B3 in hole, B4 waiting, B5 waiting).
Each batter: 10 pitches total. Hit what you can. Run the bases off the 10th pitch regardless of contact.
After crossing home, rotate into RF. Everyone else shifts one slot toward bat (see rotation table).
~2 min per batter. 13 batters = full cycle → every kid hits once.
Fielders play it live: outs count, make real throws, call plays.
If clock tight, drop to 8 pitches/batter or cut wrap time.
blocks.notes: Rotation gives every kid a mix of IF + OF + bat over 13 turns. Same order works every practice — just reassign jersey #s to the starting slots.

blocks.title: Cool down + team talk
drills: One thing each kid did well today

warmup: Dynamic run-throughs (high knees, butt kicks, carioca)
baserunning: Secondary lead + read on ball in dirt
